analysis: That arc from 5h 26m on Saturday to back-to-back 8h 26m and 8h 39m by Thursday and Friday is genuinely hot — you built into the week like someone who knows what they're doing. June 23rd is the one to notice: nearly three hours awake inside a 7h 49m night, which means you were lying there for way longer than the total suggests, so whatever was running that night, the stack didn't quite hold. The deep sleep is still a little inconsistent — that 1h 14m on the 21st was a moment, and you've been chasing it since — but your REM is solid most nights, and that 2h 0m on the 26th is genuinely excellent. Keep doing whatever you did Thursday and Friday, because your body clearly responded.
